response.overview: Months after killing his best friend as a result of a manic episode, Alex finds himself captured in a room being questioned but he remembers little to none of what happened. After a mysterious man pulls him out of the room, he is even more confused. He eventually finds out that none of this is real and it's all being controlled by somebody on the outside, his mission is to escape this fake world, and find whatever monster did this to him and get all the answers out of him that he needs.
response.title: Vive Le Pouvoir
